channel.title: +Cochran Gregory on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Cochran Gregory on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Educational Reform
item.description: Source: here. Educational Reform Many people talk about the dire state of American education. Naturally, almost all of what they say is nonsense. You would expect that, since they were educated in that awful system… Constancy One common theme is that education has gone to the dogs. Kids aren’t learning the way they used to. College graduates aren’t as smart as they once were. Blah blah blah. All false. Average academic achievement has not changed much over the years.
